/usr/bin/c++  -fPIC -g -Wdeprecated-declarations -arch arm64 -dynamiclib -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names -o ../../lib/libBHV_Scout.dylib -install_name @rpath/libBHV_Scout.dylib CMakeFiles/BHV_Scout.dir/BHV_Scout.cpp.o   -L/Users/georgedimitropoulos/Documents/moos-ivp/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/Users/georgedimitropoulos/Documents/moos-ivp/lib -lhelmivp -lbehaviors -livpbuild -llogic -livpcore -lbhvutil -lmbutil -lgeometry
